summary.lv: Linux sistēmu administrators fintech uzņēmumā MONELIQ Europe — 24/7 infrastruktūras uzturēšana ar GitLab, Terraform, Nginx, Ansible un Zabbix; nepieciešama 3+ gadu Linux administrēšanas pieredze.
summary.en: Linux system administrator at fintech company MONELIQ Europe maintaining 24/7 infrastructure with GitLab, Terraform, Nginx, Ansible and Zabbix; 3+ years of Linux administration experience required.
